text: All projects must review and follow this inclement weather plan. GS Mountain project team members will monitor the daily weather conditions with a credible weather monitoring system such as Weather Bug, AccuWeather, NOAA, Windy, etc. The system must be capable of sending notifications and each user must have the notifications feature enabled. Senior leaders and project team members will monitor weather developments and plan accordingly. Storm patterns that could produce inclement weather require a Pre-Planning Meeting, personnel considerations, and a Recovery Plan post event.
